svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="RequestId 三段贯通" id="obsFlow"> <mxGraphModel dx="-474" dy="-118" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="920" pageHeight="420" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="RequestId 贯通：前端生成优先，后端 Filter 兜底，MQ 消息头跨进程透传" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="540" x="190" y="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FE" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="前端 axios 拦截器
crypto.randomUUID() → header
X-Request-Id（无横线）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="40" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FILTER" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="后端 RequestTraceFilter (order=1)
取 header → 没有 resolveRequestId 兜底生成
MDC.put + ThreadLocal
finally: MDC.remove + clear" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="260" x="320" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CTL" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="Controller / Service
RequestTraceContext.getRequestId()
日志自动带 requestId" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="640" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EFE" edge="1" parent="1" source="FE" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="FILTER"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EFC" edge="1" parent="1" source="FILTER" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="CTL"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LFE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;" value="同 id 贯穿" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="100" x="90" y="148" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MQBOX" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="跨进程：RabbitMQ 消息头透传" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="320" x="40" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PROD" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="生产者 MqTraceHelper
header x-request-id = 当前线程 id
+ x-tenant-id" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="40" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CONS" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="消费者 restoreTraceContext()
从消息头恢复到 MDC
没带 id → 兜底生成 mq- 前缀" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="340" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ASYNC" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="异步线程池
MdcTaskDecorator 传播
requestId + tenantId
备份→执行→恢复（防嵌套串号）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="640" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EPQ" edge="1" parent="1" source="PROD" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="CONS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LMQ" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;" value="mq- 前缀：一眼区分「来自 MQ 消费」还是「来自 HTTP」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="440" x="120" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FOOT" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Filter 比 Interceptor 更靠前：404 / 鉴权失败 401 这些走不到 Controller 的边界请求，也能拿到 requestId" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="720" x="100" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 421px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: RequestId 贯通：前端生成优先，后端 Filter 兜底，MQ 消息头跨进程透传

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 91px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
前端 axios 拦截器
crypto.randomUUID() → header
X-Request-Id（无横线）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 91px; margin-left: 282px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
后端 RequestTraceFilter (order=1)
取 header → 没有 resolveRequestId 兜底生成
MDC.put + ThreadLocal
finally: MDC.remove + clear

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

RequestTraceContext.getRequestId()

header x-request-id = 当前线程 id

消费者 restoreTraceContext()
从消息头恢复到 MDC
没带 id → 兜底生成 mq- 前缀

div.div:
异步线程池
MdcTaskDecorator 传播
requestId + tenantId
备份→执行→恢复（防嵌套串号）
